heroSubtitle: Preserving Minnesota's premier walleye fishery since 1982. Join us in keeping the tradition alive for future generations.
welcomeTitle: Welcome to the LQP Lake Association
boardMembers: Scott Monson, Steve Mitlyng, Joe Bungarden, Pete McGinty, Andy Johnson, Brett Jacobs, Gary Groothius

announcements.title: Tri-County Let's Go Fishing Donation
announcements.content: Lake Association recently donated $12,000 to Tri-County Let's Go Fishing.

announcements.title: Watch for Fin-Clipped Walleyes
announcements.content: If you catch a walleye with a clipped bottom left pectoral fin, it was stocked through our program. Please email minnkotatackle@yahoo.com to report your catch!
